title: 修改iBMC 服务信息
command: curl -k -u admin:password -X PATCH 'https://<bmc_ip>/redfish/v1/Managers/manager_id/NetworkProtocol' -H 'Content-Type: application/json' -d '{  "Oem": {   "Huawei": {    "EncryptionEnabled": false,    "FloppyDriveEnabled": true   }  } }'
description: 修改服务器iBMC指定服务的使能状态及端口号。

title: 重启iBMC
command: curl -k -u admin:password -X POST 'https://<bmc_ip>/redfish/v1/Managers/manager_id/Actions/' -H 'Content-Type: application/json' -d '{  "Oem": {   "Huawei": {    "EncryptionEnabled": false,    "FloppyDriveEnabled": true   }  } }'

title: 切换iBMC 镜像

command: curl -k -u admin:password -X POST 'https://<bmc_ip>/redfish/v1/Managers/manager_id/SPService/Actions/' -H 'Content-Type: application/json' -d '{  "ServiceEnabled": false,  "CertVerificationEnabled": false,  "ServerAddress": "device_ip",  "ServerPort": 25,  "TLSEnabled": true,  "AnonymousLoginEnabled": false,  "SenderUserName": "huawei",  "SenderPassword": "Password",  "SenderAddress": "huawei@outlook.com",  "EmailSubject": "Server Alert",  "EmailSubjectContains": [],  "AlarmSeverity": "Normal",  "ReportType": "SEL",  "RecipientAddresses": [   {    "Enabled": false,    "EmailAddress": "smtptest@it.software.com",    "Description": "smtptest"   }  ] }'
request_body:
{
  "ServiceEnabled": false,
  "CertVerificationEnabled": false,
  "ServerAddress": "device_ip",
  "ServerPort": 25,
  "TLSEnabled": true,
  "AnonymousLoginEnabled": false,
  "SenderUserName": "huawei",
  "SenderPassword": "Password",
  "SenderAddress": "huawei@outlook.com",
  "EmailSubject": "Server Alert",
  "EmailSubjectContains": [],
  "AlarmSeverity": "Normal",
  "ReportType": "SEL",
  "RecipientAddresses": [
    {
      "Enabled": false,
      "EmailAddress": "smtptest@it.software.com",
      "Description": "smtptest"
    }
  ]
}

  "EmailSubject": "Server Alert",

  "RecipientAddresses": [

description: 查询设备当前CA证书集合资源信息。  说明  自iBMC300 5.2.0.1版本后证书升级为资源池，根证书和所有其他BMC业务公用。建议使用此接口对CA证书进行管理。  共用根证书的包括BMC所有校验对端服务器的业务，如Syslog、SMTP、LDAP、SSL证书更新、远程HTTPS服务器、双因素登录。   ## 命令格式  操作类型：GET  URL：https://device_ip/red
